layoutRegions.name: masthead
layoutRegions.purpose: Summarize privileged activation planning and expose the role-change staging action.

layoutRegions.name: activation-queue
layoutRegions.purpose: Inspect just-in-time privileged role activations, role windows, request reasons, and deactivation state.

layoutRegions.name: approval-and-drift-panels
layoutRegions.purpose: Compare approval chains, risky assignments, standing access drift, owner intent, and emergency elevation.

layoutRegions.name: deactivation-plans
layoutRegions.purpose: Stage rollback-safe role deactivation plans with reversible emergency access paths.

components.name: ActivationCard
components.purpose: Shows one privileged role activation with requester, role, activation window, reason, and approved, review, or deactivate state.
interactions: state is visible through tokenized border color
card content stays stable across responsive breakpoints

components.name: ApprovalChainCard
components.purpose: Captures owner intent, approval evidence, and risky assignment state for a privileged activation chain.
interactions: review state remains visible without relying on layout position

components.name: RoleDeactivationPlan
components.purpose: Captures deactivation action and rollback-safe recovery path for standing or emergency access.
interactions: rollback note remains visible at narrow widths

acceptanceChecks: Generated app imports src/omarchy-theme.css before app styles.
Every visible color comes from a --omarchy-* CSS variable or color-mix using one.
Every button, row, input, and command item has a visible :focus-visible state.
Layout remains stable at 320px, 768px, and 1280px viewport widths.
Primary content is usable on first load without a marketing interstitial.
A .desktop launcher can be generated with omarchy-native app desktop.
An opt-in theme sync hook can be generated with omarchy-native app hook.
